page: Amazon Web Services m8gd.16xlarge is a general-purpose server powered by custom AWS Graviton processors. Built on the ARM64 architecture, it features 64 dedicated physical cores utilizing the ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 model running at 2.8 GHz. The processor configuration includes 64 KB of L1d cache, 2 MB of L2 cache, and 36 MB of L3 cache, with hardware support for AES cryptography. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance utilizes the Nitro hypervisor and includes 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 30 Gbps. The server does not feature any GPU accelerators.

Benchmark results show top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and multi-core Geekbench tests. Database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput also rank in the top tier. Single-core performance and CPU encryption tests fall in the average range, while LLM text generation with a small model is weak. This hardware profile is highly suited for high-throughput database operations, software compilation, static web serving, and memory-intensive multi-threaded workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.16xlarge is a general-purpose server powered by a 64-core ARM64 AWS Graviton processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 256.0 GB of system memory, 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, this instance delivers top-tier memory bandwidth, multi-core processing, and database operation speeds, as demonstrated in Redis and static web serving benchmarks. Single-core performance and cryptographic operations fall in the average tier. The server is highly effective for high-throughput database systems, multi-threaded data processing, software compilation, and web serving workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.16xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose server featuring 64 Graviton physical cores, 256 GB RAM, 3800 GB NVMe SSD storage, and top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.

tagline: An ARM64 general-purpose server featuring dedicated physical cores, high-capacity local NVMe storage, and exceptional memory bandwidth for database workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
3800 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage
30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor
Top-tier performance in database operations, Redis, and memory bandwidth
Suited for high-throughput databases, software compilation, and web serving
